chapter_title.en: Chapter 18 – Distribution of the war booty

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/382)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/382)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْغَنِيمَةِ فَقَالَ يُخْرَجُ مِنْهَا خُمُسٌ لِلَّهِ وَ خُمُسٌ لِلرَّسُولِ وَ مَا بَقِيَ قُسِمَ بَيْنَ مَنْ قَاتَلَ عَلَيْهِ وَ وَلِيَ ذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Mansour Bin Hazim, from Hisham Bin Salim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the war booty, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘One-fifth would be taken out from it for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and a fifth for the Rasool<sup>saww</sup>, and whatever remains would be distributed between the ones who fought over it, and be the guardians of that’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Mansur ibn Hazim from Hisham ibn Salim who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about properties gained during a war from the enemies. He (the Imam) replied, ’One-fifth is kept aside thereof which is for Allah and the Messenger. The rest is divided among the fighters and the guardian thereof.’”
